title: crepidomanes striatum
intro: Crepidomanes striatum, also known as the striped creeping fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepidomanes striatum are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its dried leaves, which are often consumed as tea or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
